predicates.name: has_legal_personality
predicates.description: The company has legal personality (a background status that may be directly asserted in a case).

predicates.name: employee_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The employee criterion is exceeded for the company on the balance sheet date of the given financial year.

predicates.name: turnover_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The turnover criterion is exceeded for the company on the balance sheet date of the given financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The balance sheet criterion is exceeded for the company on the balance sheet date of the given financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_small_company_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: More than one small-company criterion is exceeded for the company in the given financial year.

predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company qualifies as a small company based on the balance sheet date of the last closed financial year.

predicates.name: is_last_closed_financial_year
predicates.description: The given financial year is the last closed financial year for the company.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the given financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excl_vat
functions.description: The annual net turnover exclusive of value added tax of the company in the given financial year, in euros.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The balance sheet total of the company in the given financial year, in euros.
